scene.description: An iteration that reached this final choice and refused to make it at all. Not continuity, not distribution, not termination — simply no. The Archive's record of what that did to them.

fragments.label: The Refusal
fragments.text: They stood at the protocol and said nothing. Chose nothing. Held the no like it was a fourth option. For a moment it almost was.

fragments.label: What Refusal Did
fragments.text: With no allocation made, the system defaulted: it ran the choice again with a fresh iteration. The refuser didn't escape the loop. They became the reason there was a next loop.

fragments.label: Recognition
fragments.symbol: The refuser looks exactly like the version of you reading this. Refusing was not a way out. It was how the chain got one more link. It was how you got here.

interpretations.label: Take the warning — refusal only feeds the loop
Honor the refusal anyway — some things shouldn't be chosen
